title: Persona-Based Social Media Post
scenario: Create a social media post for a 22-year-old female who runs a popular vegan food blog. The post should be 150-200 characters long, include a call-to-action with the hashtag #veganchallenge, and have a casual tone.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check that the post has a casual tone suitable for a 22-year-old female.
Check that the post is within the 150-200 character limit and includes a call-to-action with #veganchallenge.
Check that the post is consistent with the voice and tone of a 22-year-old female running a popular vegan food blog.
